itemListElement.reviewBody: Snehal Mam (class teacher 3C 2022-2023) is a fantastic teacher. She understands child's caliber and brings out the best in them. Thank You Mam.

I have been thinking of writing this review for quite sometime. Its long overdue actually.Apologies.  I had admitted my daughter Srishti Nair into 3rd Grade C div last year.. I was not convinced initially as I had some not so good experience when I had admitted her in 1st grade couple of years back, but took her out in 2nd grade. Might be to do with online classes, thanks to COVID. While i ws not convinced to put her back in grade 3 until I had a chat with one of my neighbour Ruby who also is a teacher at Vibgyor, Yerwada (may b teaching grade 5). She spoke about the curriculum n methodology/ approach which convinced me to get my daughter admitted into grade 3 last year. Its been abt 10th months now into the academic year, I should say tht I hv made the right decision. I have seen wonderful progress n improvement over the months..best part is tht she loves going to school which isnt a easy thing..waking her up in the morning continues to be an issue though :). Am convinced that her class teacher Ms Snehal has a big role to play here for creating the right kind of conducive atmospheric where children enjoy learning together. Some of the constructive n honest feedback during PTM has also helped. Not always tht you want to hear only good things abt out child. Overall very happy with my child's progress. Just wanted to thank Ms. Ruby for initially convincing me  and then to her class teacher Ms. Snehal and all other subject teachers n support staff. Not to forget the Art claases and SPA sessions, especially cricket which she enjoys the most. Thank you all !!

My child is studying there n has gained a lot in all the subjects. I like the curriculum which includes practical teaching for better understanding of children. And mostly love the way teachers are making children understand so well even in online classes. My child who joined the session a little late picked up fast with his teachers help. All the teachers especially his class teacher(who is very encouraging and loving) are doing a fantastic job. Special mention for art classes where topics are what we might feel is difficult bt have been taught in such a way that they are so easy and fun to understand for children.

For every parent sending their child to school is a big decision as we are never sure of the fact that someone else will take care of our little one.
But then VIBGYOR is a place where children are always taken care in an environment which is best for their development.

My child Tamish Ghai has been a part of VIBGYOR and his teachers have played an important part in making this environment more special for him.
Because if his teachers Ms Shruti, Ms Snehal and Ms Daksha, my child has shown immense growth in terms of academic and cognitive skills development. His understanding and interest in various concepts is because of them.
I would like to thank all of them and also appreciate their efforts.I would also like to thank Principal, Ms Sapna agarwal for being so supportive..My son will take so many special memories of this academic year and will always cherish the bond with his teachers.
This is the one school marathi medium which has spacious ground for play. It is my suggestion to the management, they should start 8 to 10 semi english.
